description: You are a logistics coordinator. Using the superstore_orders.csv file located at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\PowerBITasks\superstore_orders.csv, build a shipping analysis report in Power BI Desktop. The report must include a calculated column named Delivery_Days representing the number of days between Order Date and Ship Date, and a measure named Avg_Delivery_Days calculating the average of the Delivery_Days column. On a single report page, include a map visual showing Sales by State, a stacked area chart showing Sales over Order Date categorized by Region, and a funnel chart showing the count of orders by Ship Mode. Save the final report to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Shipping_Analysis.pbix.
